---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2023 - ongoing.


## Internships

1.  Firm GİMAS AŞ , Machining intern , year 2024 July- 2024 August

2.  Firm POLİBAK Plastic Film , position Metallizer intern , year 2025 August- 2025 June

# Projects
Currently working on a project in a CMO team but i can't tell anything about it yet.

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, Matlab, Autocad

# Hobbies
Swimming, reading, travelling
